modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to include email signature when replying to messages.

full_description_text: 
So, the user was trying to respond to emails but ran into a snag—his signature just wouldn’t show up. It only appears when he starts a new email, which is pretty frustrating. He was using Outlook and the Outlook Web Application on Firefox, and he really wanted to know how to create a signature that works for replies too. It’s a common issue, but it’s definitely a hassle when you’re trying to keep things professional in your emails.
